videos.title: Gran Fondo Myoko 2021
videos.description:
The old boys from Kyoto take on Japan's toughest Gran Fondo in Myoko. Details of the event can be found on the website:

https://www.gfmyoko.com/

Music from bensound.com and pixabay.com/music/
